evals.prompt: I'm in this Draftspace repo locally and I want to work through every unresolved proposal comment one by one. Draft replies first, then let me decide which ones to post.
evals.expected_output: The skill should detect unresolved `.comments.json` threads, present them in order, read proposal markdown for context, and draft replies before posting through the local Draftspace API.

evals.prompt: Use Draftspace local mode to review the open comments on auth-overhaul, post a reply where appropriate, and resolve anything that's already addressed in the proposal text.
evals.expected_output: The skill should focus on a single proposal, distinguish between reply and resolve actions, and write comment mutations through the local server instead of editing sidecar JSON directly.

evals.prompt: /draftspace-review — walk me through the feedback in this repo, but skip threads whose quoted text no longer exists in the markdown and tell me why.
evals.expected_output: The skill should validate quote presence against proposal markdown, call out orphaned or stale quote contexts, and avoid blindly drafting replies for unmatched threads.
